tagline: Unified strategy, technology, and delivery. An Australian technology consultancy.
hero_heading: Strategy, technology, and delivery — AI-enabled, under one roof.
hero_sub: An Australian technology consultancy partnering with enterprise and government leaders to deliver strategy, transformation, complex programs, technical platforms, data capability, integration, and change adoption.
about_para1: Infocus Group was founded in Sydney in 2019 on a straightforward premise: that the organisations doing the most consequential work — in government, financial services, healthcare, and enterprise — deserved technology consulting that combined genuine strategic depth with the hands-on delivery capability to execute it.
about_para2: We brought together a partner network of senior practitioners with experience across consulting, program delivery, cyber security, data and AI, integration, and talent — people who had led and delivered programs of real scale and complexity, not just advised on them from a distance.
about_para3: Today we operate across six integrated practices, working with enterprise and government leaders on the programs that matter most to their organisations. Our capability spans the full arc from strategy through to sustained adoption — and we do not separate the two.
about_para4: As AI redefines what is possible and cybersecurity becomes an operating imperative, we are helping organisations navigate these shifts with the technical depth, delivery discipline, and change capability that the moment requires.
cta_heading: Let's start with a thirty-minute conversation.
cta_body: No pitch. No template deliverables. A working session where we map your most pressing delivery challenge against the work we have done in similar contexts and tell you whether we can help.
